allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix\(config\): gitignore에 임시파일 패턴 추가 및 CLAUDE.md 업데이트

- tmpclaude-*-cwd 패턴 추가 \(Claude Code 임시파일 무시\)
- CLAUDE.md 문서 내용 보완 \(bcrypt, helmet, Swagger 등\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 0 POC: Backend services, tests, Electron setup

- Backend: Redis, session, receipt, transaction services with tests
- Backend: Cache, metrics utilities with 80%+ coverage
- Frontend: Electron main/preload, IPC handlers
- Frontend: Composables \(useLoading, useModal, usePagination, useToast\)
- Frontend: Cart, menu store tests
- E2E: BDD feature files \(cart, member, payment\)
- Docs: Phase 0 POC report, feature design spec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(wmic process where "CommandLine like ''%%AI_POSON/backend%%'' and name=''node.exe''" get ProcessId)
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y tmux")
Bash(cmd //c start wt -p "Ubuntu" -- bash -ic "cd c:/workspaces/AI_POSON && tmux new -s claude -d ''claude'' && tmux attach -t claude")
Bash(cmd //c start wt -p "Ubuntu" -- bash -ic "cd ''c:/workspaces/AI_POSON'' && tmux new-session -s claude")
Bash(cmd //c "tasklist /FI ""IMAGENAME eq POSON Kiosk.exe"" 2>nul & tasklist /FI ""IMAGENAME eq electron.exe"" 2>nul")
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM ""POSON Kiosk.exe"" 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>nul & echo Done")
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%electron%'' or name like ''%POSON%''" delete)
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%electron%'' or name like ''%POSON%''" get ProcessId,Name)
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%electron%'' or name like ''%POSON%'' or name like ''%poson%''" delete)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen
$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\)
$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\)
$graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\)
$bitmap.Save\(''C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON\\frontend\\screenshot-test.png'', [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
$graphics.Dispose\(\)
$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
Write-Output ''Screenshot saved''
")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
[System.Drawing.Bitmap] $b = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1920, 1080\)
[System.Drawing.Graphics] $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($b\)
$g.CopyFromScreen\(0, 0, 0, 0, $b.Size\)
$b.Save\(''C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON\\frontend\\screenshot-app.png'', [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
$g.Dispose\(\)
$b.Dispose\(\)
Write-Output ''Done''
")

Bash(git -C "C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON" diff --staged --stat -- frontend/src/main/index.ts frontend/src/renderer/index.html frontend/src/renderer/src/utils/image.ts backend/src/routes/uploads.ts frontend/src/renderer/src/components/ frontend/src/renderer/src/views/ frontend/src/renderer/src/stores/network.ts)

Bash(git -C "C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON" reset HEAD -- frontend/bring-to-front.ps1 frontend/check-images-cdp.js frontend/check-images-cdp2.js frontend/check-images-http.js frontend/check-images.js frontend/take-screenshot.ps1 frontend/verify-env.js frontend/verify-security.js)

Bash(git -C "C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON" add frontend/src/main/index.ts frontend/src/renderer/index.html frontend/src/renderer/src/utils/image.ts backend/src/routes/uploads.ts frontend/src/renderer/src/components/cart/CartPanel.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/components/menu/CategoryNav.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/components/menu/MenuGrid.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/stores/network.ts frontend/src/renderer/src/views/CartView.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/views/MenuView.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/views/PaymentView.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/views/admin/CategoriesView.vue frontend/src/renderer/src/views/kiosk/OrderConfirmView.vue)

Bash(git -C "C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Electron 프로덕션 빌드 이미지 로딩 수정 및 보안 강화

- app:// 커스텀 프로토콜로 file:// CORS 제한 우회
- getImageSrc 유틸리티로 /uploads/ 경로를 절대 URL로 변환
- helmet CSP가 이미지 로딩 차단하는 문제 해결 \(서브리소스만 제거\)
- Path Traversal 방어: resolve\(\) + startsWith\(\) 경로 검증
- env:get IPC 화이트리스트 적용 \(DB/JWT 시크릿 노출 차단\)
- DELETE /uploads 인증 미들웨어 추가
- CSP 강화: img-src/connect-src를 localhost:3000으로 제한

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\workspaces\\AI_POSON" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: electron 프로덕션 빌드 이미지 로딩 수정 및 보안 강화

- app:// 커스텀 프로토콜로 file:// CORS 제한 우회
- getImageSrc 유틸리티로 /uploads/ 경로를 절대 URL로 변환
- helmet CSP가 이미지 로딩 차단하는 문제 해결 \(서브리소스만 제거\)
- Path Traversal 방어: resolve\(\) + startsWith\(\) 경로 검증
- env:get IPC 화이트리스트 적용 \(DB/JWT 시크릿 노출 차단\)
- DELETE /uploads 인증 미들웨어 추가
- CSP 강화: img-src/connect-src를 localhost:3000으로 제한

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
